query:
-- Which billing items are matched but missing assignment records?
SELECT 
  bi.billingPlatform,
  bi.matchStatus,
  COUNT(*) as cnt,
  SUM(bi.lineAmount) as totalAmount
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
WHERE bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
  AND bi.serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND bi.serviceExternalId != ''
  AND sba.id IS NULL
GROUP BY bi.billingPlatform, bi.matchStatus
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
